```{r}
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.25), size = 2) +  # Adjust position to separate points
  theme_bw()+
  facet_wrap(~Sex)+
  scale_color_manual(values = c( "Baseline"="lightgreen", "PBS" = "lightblue", "Bacteroides" = "orange")) +
  geom_line(aes(group = interaction(Cage,Mouse)), size = 0.25) + # Add this line to connect points for each MouseID
  ylim(140,250)


Nano_normalized_long_Ikbke_df_pointplot


ggsave("Nano_normalized_long_Ikbke_df_pointplot.pdf", plot = Nano_normalized_long_Ikbke_df_pointplot
, device = "pdf", width = 4, height = 2)



#Run stats ikbke



  pvb_model_ikbke <- lm(log2(NormalizedCount) ~ Treatment + Sex +Treatment*Sex, data = Nano_normalized_long_Ikbke_df)
summary(pvb_model_ikbke)



```

#Make a plot of Fcgr4 Expression in the distal colon and do stats
```{r}


# Subset Nano_normalized_long_df for the specified genes
Nano_normalized_long_Fcgr4_df <- Nano_normalized_long_df %>%
  filter(Gene %in% "Fcgr4")

pvb_treatment <- c("PBS", "Bacteroides")

# Subset Nano_normalized_long_df for the specified treatments and biogeography
Nano_normalized_long_Fcgr4_df <- Nano_normalized_long_Fcgr4_df %>%
  filter(Treatment %in% pvb_treatment,
         Biogeography %in% c("Dis"))


# Factor the 'Treatment' column with specific levels
Nano_normalized_long_Fcgr4_df$Treatment <- factor(Nano_normalized_long_Fcgr4_df$Treatment, 
                                                        levels = c("Baseline", "PBS", "Bacteroides"))

Nano_normalized_long_Fcgr4_df$NormalizedCount <- as.numeric(Nano_normalized_long_Fcgr4_df$NormalizedCount)



# Create the point plot


Nano_normalized_long_Fcgr4_df_pointplot <- ggplot(Nano_normalized_long_Fcgr4_df, aes( x=Treatment, y=NormalizedCount, color = Treatment, shape = Sex))+
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.25), size = 2) +  # Adjust position to separate points
  theme_bw()+
  facet_wrap(~Sex)+
  geom_line(aes(group = interaction(Cage,Mouse)), size = 0.25) # Add this line to connect points for each MouseID

Nano_normalized_long_Fcgr4_df_pointplot


ggsave("Nano_normalized_long_Fcgr4_df_pointplot.pdf", plot = Nano_normalized_long_Fcgr4_df_pointplot
, device = "pdf", width = 4, height = 2)



#Run stats ikbke



  pvb_model_ikbke <- lm(log2(NormalizedCount) ~ Treatment + Sex +Treatment*Sex, data = Nano_normalized_long_Ikbke_df)
summary(pvb_model_ikbke)



```

#Make a plot of all genes that are Neutrophils 
```{r}


# List of genes to keep
genes_to_keep <- c("Ceacam3", "Csf3r", "Fcgr4", "Fpr1")

# Subset Nano_normalized_long_df for the specified genes
Nano_normalized_long_neutrophils_df <- Nano_normalized_long_df %>%
  filter(Gene %in% genes_to_keep)


# Factor the 'Treatment' column with specific levels
Nano_normalized_long_neutrophils_df$Treatment <- factor(Nano_normalized_long_neutrophils_df$Treatment, 
                                                        levels = c("PBS", "Bacteroides", "Baseline"))
# Factor the 'Biogeography' column with specific levels
Nano_normalized_long_neutrophils_df$Biogeography <- factor(Nano_normalized_long_neutrophils_df$Biogeography, 
                                                        levels = c("SI", "Cec", "Pro", "Dis"))

Nano_normalized_long_neutrophils_df$NormalizedCount <- as.numeric(Nano_normalized_long_neutrophils_df$NormalizedCount)



# Create the point plot


Nano_normalized_long_neutrophils_df_pointplot <- ggplot(Nano_normalized_long_neutrophils_df, aes( x=Biogeography, y=NormalizedCount, color = Treatment))+
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.25), size = 2) +  # Adjust position to separate points
  stat_summary(fun.y = mean, size=2, geom = "line", aes(group = Treatment)) +
  theme_bw()+
  facet_wrap(~Gene, scales = "free_y", nrow = 4) + # Facet by gene with free y-axis and 4 rows
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Baseline" = "lightgreen", "PBS" = "lightblue", "Bacteroides" = "orange")) +
  geom_line(aes(group = interaction(Cage,Mouse)), size = 0.25)  # Add this line to connect points for each MouseID


Nano_normalized_long_neutrophils_df_pointplot


ggsave("Nano_normalized_long_neutrophils_df_pointplot.pdf", plot = Nano_normalized_long_neutrophils_df_pointplot
, device = "pdf", width = 8, height = 6)

# Create the box plot

Nano_normalized_long_neutrophils_df_boxplot <- ggplot(Nano_normalized_long_neutrophils_df, aes(x = Biogeography, y = NormalizedCount, color = Treatment)) +
  geom_boxplot() +  # Use geom_boxplot
  theme_bw() +
  facet_wrap(~ Gene, scales = "free_y", nrow = 4) +  # Facet by gene with free y-axis and 4 rows
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Baseline" = "lightgreen", "PBS" = "lightblue", "Bacteroides" = "orange"))

Nano_normalized_long_neutrophils_df_boxplot

ggsave("Nano_normalized_long_neutrophils_df_boxplot.pdf", plot = Nano_normalized_long_neutrophils_df_boxplot
, device = "pdf", width = 10, height = 6)


#Run stats Ceacam3
Nano_normalized_long_neutrophils_df_Ceacam3_base <- Nano_normalized_long_neutrophils_df %>%
  filter(Gene == "Ceacam3" & Treatment %in% c("Baseline"))

Nano_normalized_long_neutrophils_df_Ceacam3_pvb <- Nano_normalized_long_neutrophils_df %>%
  filter(Gene == "Ceacam3" & Treatment %in% c("PBS", "Bacteroides"))


  base_model_Ceacam3 <- lmerTest::lmer(log2(NormalizedCount) ~ Biogeography + Sex + (1|Cage/Mouse), data = Nano_normalized_long_neutrophils_df_Ceacam3_base)
summary(base_model_Ceacam3)

  pvb_model_Ceacam3 <- lmerTest::lmer(log2(NormalizedCount) ~ Treatment + Sex + Biogeography + Biogeography*Treatment + (1|Cage/Mouse), data = Nano_normalized_long_neutrophils_df_Ceacam3_pvb)
summary(pvb_model_Ceacam3)



#Run stats Csf3r
Nano_normalized_long_neutrophils_df_Csf3r_base <- Nano_normalized_long_neutrophils_df %>%
  filter(Gene %in% "Csf3r"& Treatment %in% c("Baseline"))

Nano_normalized_long_neutrophils_df_Csf3r_pvb <- Nano_normalized_long_neutrophils_df %>%
  filter(Gene %in% "Csf3r"& Treatment %in% c("PBS", "Bacteroides"))

  base_model_Csf3r <- lmerTest::lmer(log2(NormalizedCount) ~ Biogeography + Sex + (1|Cage/Mouse), data = Nano_normalized_long_neutrophils_df_Csf3r_base)
summary(base_model_Csf3r)

  bvp_model_Csf3r <- lmerTest::lmer(log2(NormalizedCount)~ Treatment + Sex + Biogeography + Biogeography*Treatment +  (1|Cage/Mouse), data = Nano_normalized_long_neutrophils_df_Csf3r_pvb)
summary(bvp_model_Csf3r)

#Run stats on Fcgr4
Nano_normalized_long_neutrophils_df_Fcgr4_base <- Nano_normalized_long_neutrophils_df %>%
  filter(Gene %in% "Fcgr4"& Treatment %in% c("Baseline"))

Nano_normalized_long_neutrophils_df_Fcgr4_pvb <- Nano_normalized_long_neutrophils_df %>%
  filter(Gene %in% "Fcgr4"& Treatment %in% c("PBS", "Bacteroides"))


  base_model_Fcgr4 <- lmerTest::lmer(log2(NormalizedCount) ~ Biogeography + Sex + (1|Cage/Mouse), data = Nano_normalized_long_neutrophils_df_Fcgr4_base)
summary(base_model_Fcgr4)

  bvp_model_Fcgr4 <- lmerTest::lmer(log2(NormalizedCount)~ Treatment + Sex + Biogeography + Biogeography*Treatment +  (1|Cage/Mouse), data = Nano_normalized_long_neutrophils_df_Fcgr4_pvb)
summary(bvp_model_Fcgr4)

#Run stats on Fpr1
Nano_normalized_long_neutrophils_df_Fpr1_base <- Nano_normalized_long_neutrophils_df %>%
  filter(Gene %in% "Fpr1"& Treatment %in% c("Baseline"))

Nano_normalized_long_neutrophils_df_Fpr1_pvb <- Nano_normalized_long_neutrophils_df %>%
  filter(Gene %in% "Fpr1"& Treatment %in% c("PBS", "Bacteroides"))


  base_model_Fpr1 <- lmerTest::lmer(log2(NormalizedCount) ~ Biogeography + Sex + (1|Cage/Mouse), data = Nano_normalized_long_neutrophils_df_Fpr1_base)
summary(base_model_Fpr1)

  bvp_model_Fpr1 <- lmerTest::lmer(log2(NormalizedCount)~ Treatment + Sex + Biogeography + Biogeography*Treatment +  (1|Cage/Mouse), data = Nano_normalized_long_neutrophils_df_Fpr1_pvb)
summary(bvp_model_Fpr1)
```

#Make a plot of all genes that are Macrophages 
```{r}


# List of genes to keep
macrophage_genes <- c("Cd163", "Cd68", "Cd84", "Ms4a4a")

# Subset Nano_normalized_long_df for the specified genes
Nano_normalized_long_macrophages_df <- Nano_normalized_long_df %>%
  filter(Gene %in% macrophage_genes)


# Factor the 'Treatment' column with specific levels
Nano_normalized_long_macrophages_df$Treatment <- factor(Nano_normalized_long_macrophages_df$Treatment, 
                                                        levels = c("PBS", "Bacteroides", "Baseline"))
# Factor the 'Biogeography' column with specific levels
Nano_normalized_long_macrophages_df$Biogeography <- factor(Nano_normalized_long_macrophages_df$Biogeography, 
                                                        levels = c("SI", "Cec", "Pro", "Dis"))

Nano_normalized_long_macrophages_df$NormalizedCount <- as.numeric(Nano_normalized_long_macrophages_df$NormalizedCount)



# Create the point plot


Nano_normalized_long_macrophages_df_pointplot <- ggplot(Nano_normalized_long_macrophages_df, aes( x=Biogeography, y=NormalizedCount, color = Treatment, shape = Sex))+
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.25), size = 2) +  # Adjust position to separate points
  stat_summary(fun.y = mean, size=2, geom = "line", aes(group = Treatment)) +
  theme_bw()+
  facet_wrap(~Gene, scales = "free_y", ncol = 4) + # Facet by gene with free y-axis and 4 rows
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Baseline" = "lightgreen", "PBS" = "lightblue", "Bacteroides" = "orange")) +
  geom_line(aes(group = interaction(Cage,Mouse)), size = 0.25)  # Add this line to connect points for each MouseID


Nano_normalized_long_macrophages_df_pointplot


ggsave("Nano_normalized_long_macrophages_df_pointplot.pdf", plot = Nano_normalized_long_macrophages_df_pointplot
, device = "pdf", width = 8, height = 3)

# Create the box plot

Nano_normalized_long_macrophages_df_boxplot <- ggplot(Nano_normalized_long_macrophages_df, aes(x = Biogeography, y = NormalizedCount, color = Treatment)) +
  geom_boxplot() +  # Use geom_boxplot
  theme_bw() +
  facet_wrap(~ Gene, scales = "free_y", nrow = 4) +  # Facet by gene with free y-axis and 4 rows
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Baseline" = "lightgreen", "PBS" = "lightblue", "Bacteroides" = "orange"))

Nano_normalized_long_macrophages_df_boxplot

ggsave("Nano_normalized_long_macrophages_df_boxplot.pdf", plot = Nano_normalized_long_macrophages_df_boxplot
, device = "pdf", width = 10, height = 6)


#Plot a boxplot of Cd163 along the gut

Nano_normalized_long_macrophages_df_cd163boxplot <- ggplot(Nano_normalized_long_macrophages_df_Cd163_pvb, aes( x=Treatment, y=NormalizedCount, color = Treatment, shape=Sex))+
  geom_boxplot() +
  geom_jitter()+
  stat_summary(fun.y = mean, size=2, geom = "line", aes(group = Treatment)) +
  theme_bw()+
  facet_wrap(~Biogeography, scales = "free_y", ncol = 4) + # Facet by gene with free y-axis and 4 rows
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Baseline" = "lightgreen", "PBS" = "lightblue", "Bacteroides" = "orange")) +
  geom_line(aes(group = interaction(Cage,Mouse)), size = 0.25)  # Add this line to connect points for each MouseID


Nano_normalized_long_macrophages_df_cd163boxplot


#Run stats Cd163
Nano_normalized_long_macrophages_df_Cd163_base <- Nano_normalized_long_macrophages_df %>%
  filter(Gene == "Cd163" & Treatment %in% c("Baseline"))

Nano_normalized_long_macrophages_df_Cd163_pvb <- Nano_normalized_long_macrophages_df %>%
  filter(Gene == "Cd163" & Treatment %in% c("PBS", "Bacteroides"))


  base_model_macrophages_Cd163 <- lmerTest::lmer(log2(NormalizedCount) ~ Biogeography + Sex + (1|Cage/Mouse), data = Nano_normalized_long_macrophages_df_Cd163_base)
summary(base_model_macrophages_Cd163)

Nano_normalized_long_macrophages_df_Cd163_pvb$Cage <- as.character(Nano_normalized_long_macrophages_df_Cd163_pvb$Cage)
Nano_normalized_long_macrophages_df_Cd163_pvb$Mouse <- as.character(Nano_normalized_long_macrophages_df_Cd163_pvb$Mouse)


pvb_model_macrophages_Cd163 <- lmer(log2(NormalizedCount) ~ Treatment + Sex +Biogeography + Biogeography*Treatment + (1|Mouse), data = Nano_normalized_long_macrophages_df_Cd163_pvb)
summary(pvb_model_macrophages_Cd163)



#Run stats Cd68
Nano_normalized_long_macrophages_df_CD68_base <- Nano_normalized_long_macrophages_df %>%
  filter(Gene %in% "Cd68"& Treatment %in% c("Baseline"))

Nano_normalized_long_macrophages_df_CD68_pvb <- Nano_normalized_long_macrophages_df %>%
  filter(Gene %in% "Cd68"& Treatment %in% c("PBS", "Bacteroides"))

  base_model_macrophages_CD68 <- lmerTest::lmer(log2(NormalizedCount) ~ Biogeography + Sex + (1|Cage/Mouse), data = Nano_normalized_long_macrophages_df_CD68_base)
summary(base_model_macrophages_CD68)

Nano_normalized_long_macrophages_df_CD68_pvb$Cage <- as.character(Nano_normalized_long_macrophages_df_CD68_pvb$Cage)
Nano_normalized_long_macrophages_df_CD68_pvb$Mouse <- as.character(Nano_normalized_long_macrophages_df_CD68_pvb$Mouse)



  bvp_model_macrophages_CD68 <- lmerTest::lmer(log2(NormalizedCount)~ Treatment + Sex + Biogeography + Biogeography*Treatment +  (1|Mouse), data = Nano_normalized_long_macrophages_df_CD68_pvb)
summary(bvp_model_macrophages_CD68)

#Run stats on Cd84
Nano_normalized_long_macrophages_df_Cd84_base <- Nano_normalized_long_macrophages_df %>%
  filter(Gene %in% "Cd84"& Treatment %in% c("Baseline"))

Nano_normalized_long_macrophages_df_Cd84_pvb <- Nano_normalized_long_macrophages_df %>%
  filter(Gene %in% "Cd84"& Treatment %in% c("PBS", "Bacteroides"))


  base_model_macrophages_Cd84 <- lmerTest::lmer(log2(NormalizedCount) ~ Biogeography + Sex + (1|Cage/Mouse), data = Nano_normalized_long_macrophages_df_Cd84_base)
summary(base_model_macrophages_Cd84)

Nano_normalized_long_macrophages_df_Cd84_pvb$Cage <- as.character(Nano_normalized_long_macrophages_df_Cd84_pvb$Cage)
Nano_normalized_long_macrophages_df_Cd84_pvb$Mouse <- as.character(Nano_normalized_long_macrophages_df_Cd84_pvb$Mouse)


  bvp_model_macrophages_Cd84 <- lmerTest::lmer(log2(NormalizedCount)~ Treatment + Sex + Biogeography + Biogeography*Treatment +  (1|Mouse), data = Nano_normalized_long_macrophages_df_Cd84_pvb)
summary(bvp_model_macrophages_Cd84)

#Run stats on Ms4a4a
Nano_normalized_long_macrophages_df_Ms4a4a_base <- Nano_normalized_long_macrophages_df %>%
  filter(Gene %in% "Ms4a4a"& Treatment %in% c("Baseline"))

Nano_normalized_long_macrophages_df_Ms4a4a_pvb <- Nano_normalized_long_macrophages_df %>%
  filter(Gene %in% "Ms4a4a"& Treatment %in% c("PBS", "Bacteroides"))


  base_model_macrophages_Ms4a4a <- lmerTest::lmer(log2(NormalizedCount) ~ Biogeography + Sex + (1|Cage/Mouse), data = Nano_normalized_long_macrophages_df_Ms4a4a_base)
summary(base_model_macrophages_Ms4a4a)

  bvp_model_macrophages_Ms4a4a <- lmerTest::lmer(log2(NormalizedCount)~ Treatment + Sex + Biogeography + Biogeography*Treatment +  (1|Mouse), data = Nano_normalized_long_macrophages_df_Ms4a4a_pvb)
summary(bvp_model_macrophages_Ms4a4a)



#RUnu a linear model for each region
# Required library
library(dplyr)

# Loop over each unique gene
for (gene in unique(Nano_normalized_long_macrophages_df$Gene)) {  # Make sure the column name is correct
    # Subset data for the current gene
    subset_data <- Nano_normalized_long_macrophages_df %>% 
                    filter(Gene == gene)  # Correct column name used in filter
    
    # Loop over each unique Biogeography
    for (bio in unique(subset_data$Biogeography)) {
        # Subset data for the current Biogeography
        bio_data <- subset_data %>% filter(Biogeography == bio)

        # Run the linear model
        model <- lm(log2(NormalizedCount) ~ Treatment + Sex +Sex*Treatment, data = bio_data)

        # Extract summary of each model
        summary_model <- summary(model)
        
        # Save the summary of each model to a text file
        file_name <- paste0("linear_models_macrophages/model_", gene, "_", bio, ".txt")
        capture.output(summary_model, file = file_name)
    }
}


 All_macro_model <- lm(log2(NormalizedCount) ~ Treatment + Sex , data = Nano_normalized_long_macrophages_df)
summary(All_macro_model)
```


#Make a plot of all genes that are dendritic cells 
```{r}


# List of genes to keep
dendritic_cell_genes <- c("Ccl2", "Cd209e", "Hsd11b1")

# Subset Nano_normalized_long_df for the specified genes
Nano_normalized_long_dendriticcells_df <- Nano_normalized_long_df %>%
  filter(Gene %in% dendritic_cell_genes)


# Factor the 'Treatment' column with specific levels
Nano_normalized_long_dendriticcells_df$Treatment <- factor(Nano_normalized_long_dendriticcells_df$Treatment, 
                                                        levels = c("PBS", "Bacteroides", "Baseline"))
# Factor the 'Biogeography' column with specific levels
Nano_normalized_long_dendriticcells_df$Biogeography <- factor(Nano_normalized_long_dendriticcells_df$Biogeography, 
                                                        levels = c("SI", "Cec", "Pro", "Dis"))

Nano_normalized_long_dendriticcells_df$NormalizedCount <- as.numeric(Nano_normalized_long_dendriticcells_df$NormalizedCount)



# Create the point plot


Nano_normalized_long_dendritic_df_pointplot <- ggplot(Nano_normalized_long_dendriticcells_df, aes( x=Biogeography, y=NormalizedCount, color = Treatment))+
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.25), size = 2) +  # Adjust position to separate points
  stat_summary(fun.y = mean, size=2, geom = "line", aes(group = Treatment)) +
  theme_bw()+
  facet_wrap(~Gene, scales = "free_y", nrow = 4) + # Facet by gene with free y-axis and 4 rows
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Baseline" = "lightgreen", "PBS" = "lightblue", "Bacteroides" = "orange")) +
  geom_line(aes(group = interaction(Cage,Mouse)), size = 0.25)  # Add this line to connect points for each MouseID


Nano_normalized_long_dendritic_df_pointplot


ggsave("Nano_normalized_long_dendritic_df_pointplot.pdf", plot = Nano_normalized_long_dendritic_df_pointplot
, device = "pdf", width = 8, height = 6)

# Create the box plot

Nano_normalized_long_dendritic_df_boxplot <- ggplot(Nano_normalized_long_dendriticcells_df, aes(x = Biogeography, y = NormalizedCount, color = Treatment)) +
  geom_boxplot() +  # Use geom_boxplot
  theme_bw() +
  facet_wrap(~ Gene, scales = "free_y", nrow = 4) +  # Facet by gene with free y-axis and 4 rows
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Baseline" = "lightgreen", "PBS" = "lightblue", "Bacteroides" = "orange"))

Nano_normalized_long_dendritic_df_boxplot

ggsave("Nano_normalized_long_dendritic_df_boxplot.pdf", plot = Nano_normalized_long_dendritic_df_boxplot
, device = "pdf", width = 10, height = 6)

#Run stats Ccl2
Nano_normalized_long_dendritic_cells_df_Ccl2_base <- Nano_normalized_long_dendriticcells_df %>%
  filter(Gene == "Ccl2" & Treatment %in% c("Baseline"))

Nano_normalized_long_dendritic_cells_df_Ccl2_pvb <- Nano_normalized_long_dendriticcells_df %>%
  filter(Gene == "Ccl2" & Treatment %in% c("PBS", "Bacteroides"))


  base_model_dendritic_cells_Ccl2 <- lmerTest::lmer(log2(NormalizedCount) ~ Biogeography + Sex + (1|Cage/Mouse), data = Nano_normalized_long_dendritic_cells_df_Ccl2_base)
summary(base_model_dendritic_cells_Ccl2)

  pvb_model_dendritic_cells_Ccl2 <- lmerTest::lmer(log2(NormalizedCount) ~ Treatment + Sex + Biogeography + Biogeography*Treatment + (1|Cage/Mouse), data = Nano_normalized_long_dendritic_cells_df_Ccl2_pvb)
summary(pvb_model_dendritic_cells_Ccl2)

#Run stats Cd209e
Nano_normalized_long_dendritic_cells_df_Cd209e_base <- Nano_normalized_long_dendriticcells_df %>%
  filter(Gene == "Cd209e" & Treatment %in% c("Baseline"))

Nano_normalized_long_dendritic_cells_df_Cd209e_pvb <- Nano_normalized_long_dendriticcells_df %>%
  filter(Gene == "Cd209e" & Treatment %in% c("PBS", "Bacteroides"))


  base_model_dendritic_cells_Cd209e <- lmerTest::lmer(log2(NormalizedCount) ~ Biogeography + Sex + (1|Cage/Mouse), data = Nano_normalized_long_dendritic_cells_df_Cd209e_base)
summary(base_model_dendritic_cells_Cd209e)

  pvb_model_dendritic_cells_Cd209e <- lmerTest::lmer(log2(NormalizedCount) ~ Treatment + Sex + Biogeography + Biogeography*Treatment + (1|Cage/Mouse), data = Nano_normalized_long_dendritic_cells_df_Cd209e_pvb)
summary(pvb_model_dendritic_cells_Cd209e)


#Run stats Hsd11b1
Nano_normalized_long_dendritic_cells_df_Hsd11b1_base <- Nano_normalized_long_dendriticcells_df %>%
  filter(Gene == "Hsd11b1" & Treatment %in% c("Baseline"))

Nano_normalized_long_dendritic_cells_df_Hsd11b1_pvb <- Nano_normalized_long_dendriticcells_df %>%
  filter(Gene == "Hsd11b1" & Treatment %in% c("PBS", "Bacteroides"))


  base_model_dendritic_cells_Hsd11b1 <- lmerTest::lmer(log2(NormalizedCount) ~ Biogeography + Sex + (1|Cage/Mouse), data = Nano_normalized_long_dendritic_cells_df_Hsd11b1_base)
summary(base_model_dendritic_cells_Hsd11b1)

  pvb_model_dendritic_cells_Hsd11b1 <- lmerTest::lmer(log2(NormalizedCount) ~ Treatment + Sex + Biogeography + Biogeography*Treatment + (1|Cage/Mouse), data = Nano_normalized_long_dendritic_cells_df_Hsd11b1_pvb)
summary(pvb_model_dendritic_cells_Hsd11b1)
```


#Make a plot of all genes that are mast cells 
```{r}


# List of genes to keep
mast_cell_genes <- c("Cpa3", "Hdc", "Ms4a2", "Tpsab1", "Tpsb2")

# Subset Nano_normalized_long_df for the specified genes
Nano_normalized_long_mast_df <- Nano_normalized_long_df %>%
  filter(Gene %in% mast_cell_genes)


# Factor the 'Treatment' column with specific levels
Nano_normalized_long_mast_df$Treatment <- factor(Nano_normalized_long_mast_df$Treatment, 
                                                        levels = c("PBS", "Bacteroides", "Baseline"))
# Factor the 'Biogeography' column with specific levels
Nano_normalized_long_mast_df$Biogeography <- factor(Nano_normalized_long_mast_df$Biogeography, 
                                                        levels = c("SI", "Cec", "Pro", "Dis"))

Nano_normalized_long_mast_df$NormalizedCount <- as.numeric(Nano_normalized_long_mast_df$NormalizedCount)



# Create the point plot


Nano_normalized_long_mast_df_pointplot <- ggplot(Nano_normalized_long_mast_df, aes( x=Biogeography, y=NormalizedCount, color = Treatment))+
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.25), size = 2) +  # Adjust position to separate points
  stat_summary(fun.y = mean, size=2, geom = "line", aes(group = Treatment)) +
  theme_bw()+
  facet_wrap(~Gene, scales = "free_y", nrow = 5) + # Facet by gene with free y-axis and 4 rows
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Baseline" = "lightgreen", "PBS" = "lightblue", "Bacteroides" = "orange")) +
  geom_line(aes(group = interaction(Cage,Mouse)), size = 0.25)  # Add this line to connect points for each MouseID


Nano_normalized_long_mast_df_pointplot

# Create the box plot

Nano_normalized_long_mast_df_boxplot <- ggplot(Nano_normalized_long_mast_df, aes(x = Biogeography, y = NormalizedCount, color = Treatment)) +
  geom_boxplot() +  # Use geom_boxplot
  theme_bw() +
  facet_wrap(~ Gene, scales = "free_y", nrow = 4) +  # Facet by gene with free y-axis and 4 rows
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Baseline" = "lightgreen", "PBS" = "lightblue", "Bacteroides" = "orange"))

Nano_normalized_long_mast_df_boxplot


ggsave("Nano_normalized_long_mast_df_boxplot.pdf", plot = Nano_normalized_long_mast_df_boxplot
, device = "pdf", width = 8, height = 6)



#Run stats Cpa3
Nano_normalized_long_mast_df_Cpa3_base <- Nano_normalized_long_mast_df %>%
  filter(Gene == "Cpa3" & Treatment %in% c("Baseline"))

Nano_normalized_long_mast_df_Cpa3_pvb <- Nano_normalized_long_mast_df %>%
  filter(Gene == "Cpa3" & Treatment %in% c("PBS", "Bacteroides"))


  base_model_mast_Cpa3 <- lmerTest::lmer(log2(NormalizedCount) ~ Biogeography + Sex + (1|Cage/Mouse), data = Nano_normalized_long_mast_df_Cpa3_base)
summary(base_model_mast_Cpa3)

  pvb_model_mast_Cpa3 <- lmerTest::lmer(log2(NormalizedCount) ~ Treatment + Sex + Biogeography + Biogeography*Treatment + (1|Cage/Mouse), data = Nano_normalized_long_mast_df_Cpa3_pvb)
summary(pvb_model_mast_Cpa3)

#Run stats Hdc
Nano_normalized_long_mast_df_Hdc_base <- Nano_normalized_long_mast_df %>%
  filter(Gene == "Hdc" & Treatment %in% c("Baseline"))

Nano_normalized_long_mast_df_Hdc_pvb <- Nano_normalized_long_mast_df %>%
  filter(Gene == "Hdc" & Treatment %in% c("PBS", "Bacteroides"))


  base_model_mast_Hdc <- lmerTest::lmer(log2(NormalizedCount) ~ Biogeography + Sex + (1|Cage/Mouse), data = Nano_normalized_long_mast_df_Hdc_base)
summary(base_model_mast_Hdc)

  pvb_model_mast_Hdc <- lmerTest::lmer(log2(NormalizedCount) ~ Treatment + Sex + Biogeography + Biogeography*Treatment + (1|Cage/Mouse), data = Nano_normalized_long_mast_df_Hdc_pvb)
summary(pvb_model_mast_Hdc)


#Run stats Ms4a2
Nano_normalized_long_mast_df_Ms4a2_base <- Nano_normalized_long_mast_df %>%
  filter(Gene == "Ms4a2" & Treatment %in% c("Baseline"))

Nano_normalized_long_mast_df_Ms4a2_pvb <- Nano_normalized_long_mast_df %>%
  filter(Gene == "Ms4a2" & Treatment %in% c("PBS", "Bacteroides"))


  base_model_mast_Ms4a2 <- lmerTest::lmer(log2(NormalizedCount) ~ Biogeography + Sex + (1|Cage/Mouse), data = Nano_normalized_long_mast_df_Ms4a2_base)
summary(base_model_mast_Ms4a2)

  pvb_model_mast_Ms4a2 <- lmerTest::lmer(log2(NormalizedCount) ~ Treatment + Sex + Biogeography + Biogeography*Treatment + (1|Cage/Mouse), data = Nano_normalized_long_mast_df_Ms4a2_pvb)
summary(pvb_model_mast_Ms4a2)

#Run stats Tpsab1
Nano_normalized_long_mast_df_Tpsab1_base <- Nano_normalized_long_mast_df %>%
  filter(Gene == "Tpsab1" & Treatment %in% c("Baseline"))

Nano_normalized_long_mast_df_Tpsab1_pvb <- Nano_normalized_long_mast_df %>%
  filter(Gene == "Tpsab1" & Treatment %in% c("PBS", "Bacteroides"))


  base_model_mast_Tpsab1 <- lmerTest::lmer(log2(NormalizedCount) ~ Biogeography + Sex + (1|Cage/Mouse), data = Nano_normalized_long_mast_df_Tpsab1_base)
summary(base_model_mast_Tpsab1)

  pvb_model_mast_Tpsab1 <- lmerTest::lmer(log2(NormalizedCount) ~ Treatment + Sex + Biogeography + Biogeography*Treatment + (1|Cage/Mouse), data = Nano_normalized_long_mast_df_Tpsab1_pvb)
summary(pvb_model_mast_Tpsab1)

#Run stats Tpsb2
Nano_normalized_long_mast_df_Tpsb2_base <- Nano_normalized_long_mast_df %>%
  filter(Gene == "Tpsb2" & Treatment %in% c("Baseline"))

Nano_normalized_long_mast_df_Tpsb2_pvb <- Nano_normalized_long_mast_df %>%
  filter(Gene == "Tpsb2" & Treatment %in% c("PBS", "Bacteroides"))


  base_model_mast_Tpsb2 <- lmerTest::lmer(log2(NormalizedCount) ~ Biogeography + Sex + (1|Cage/Mouse), data = Nano_normalized_long_mast_df_Tpsb2_base)
summary(base_model_mast_Tpsb2)

  pvb_model_mast_Tpsb2 <- lmerTest::lmer(log2(NormalizedCount) ~ Treatment + Sex + Biogeography + Biogeography*Treatment + (1|Cage/Mouse), data = Nano_normalized_long_mast_df_Tpsb2_pvb)
summary(pvb_model_mast_Tpsb2)

```

#Make a plot of all genes associated with CD45 
```{r}


# List of genes to keep
CD45_cell_genes <- c("Ptprc")

# Subset Nano_normalized_long_df for the specified genes
Nano_normalized_long_CD45_df <- Nano_normalized_long_df %>%
  filter(Gene %in% CD45_cell_genes)


# Factor the 'Treatment' column with specific levels
Nano_normalized_long_CD45_df$Treatment <- factor(Nano_normalized_long_CD45_df$Treatment, 
                                                        levels = c("PBS", "Bacteroides", "Baseline"))
# Factor the 'Biogeography' column with specific levels
Nano_normalized_long_CD45_df$Biogeography <- factor(Nano_normalized_long_CD45_df$Biogeography, 
                                                        levels = c("SI", "Cec", "Pro", "Dis"))

Nano_normalized_long_CD45_df$NormalizedCount <- as.numeric(Nano_normalized_long_CD45_df$NormalizedCount)



# Create the point plot


Nano_normalized_long_CD45_df_pointplot <- ggplot(Nano_normalized_long_CD45_df, aes( x=Biogeography, y=NormalizedCount, color = Treatment))+
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.25), size = 2) +  # Adjust position to separate points
  stat_summary(fun.y = mean, size=2, geom = "line", aes(group = Treatment)) +
  theme_bw()+
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Baseline" = "lightgreen", "PBS" = "lightblue", "Bacteroides" = "orange")) +
  geom_line(aes(group = interaction(Cage,Mouse)), size = 0.25)  # Add this line to connect points for each MouseID


Nano_normalized_long_CD45_df_pointplot


ggsave("Nano_normalized_long_CD45_df_pointplot.pdf", plot = Nano_normalized_long_CD45_df_pointplot
, device = "pdf", width = 8, height = 4)

# Create the box plot

Nano_normalized_long_CD45_df_boxplot <- ggplot(Nano_normalized_long_CD45_df, aes(x = Biogeography, y = NormalizedCount, color = Treatment)) +
  geom_boxplot() +  # Use geom_boxplot
  theme_bw() +
  facet_wrap(~ Gene, scales = "free_y", nrow = 4) +  # Facet by gene with free y-axis and 4 rows
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Baseline" = "lightgreen", "PBS" = "lightblue", "Bacteroides" = "orange"))

Nano_normalized_long_CD45_df_boxplot

ggsave("Nano_normalized_long_CD45_df_boxplot.pdf", plot = Nano_normalized_long_CD45_df_boxplot
, device = "pdf", width = 10, height = 6)


#Run stats Ptprc
Nano_normalized_long_CD45_df_Ptprc_base <- Nano_normalized_long_CD45_df %>%
  filter(Gene == "Ptprc" & Treatment %in% c("Baseline"))

Nano_normalized_long_CD45_df_Ptprc_pvb <- Nano_normalized_long_CD45_df %>%
  filter(Gene == "Ptprc" & Treatment %in% c("PBS", "Bacteroides"))


  base_model_CD45_Ptprc <- lmerTest::lmer(log2(NormalizedCount) ~ Biogeography + Sex + (1|Cage/Mouse), data = Nano_normalized_long_CD45_df_Ptprc_base)
summary(base_model_CD45_Ptprc)

  pvb_model_CD45_Ptprc <- lmerTest::lmer(log2(NormalizedCount) ~ Treatment + Sex + Biogeography + Biogeography*Treatment + (1|Cage/Mouse), data = Nano_normalized_long_CD45_df_Ptprc_pvb)
summary(pvb_model_CD45_Ptprc)


```

#Make a plot of all genes associated with Treg cells 
```{r}


# List of genes to keep
Treg_cell_genes <- c("Foxp3")

# Subset Nano_normalized_long_df for the specified genes
Nano_normalized_long_Treg_df <- Nano_normalized_long_df %>%
  filter(Gene %in% Treg_cell_genes)


# Factor the 'Treatment' column with specific levels
Nano_normalized_long_Treg_df$Treatment <- factor(Nano_normalized_long_Treg_df$Treatment, 
                                                        levels = c("PBS", "Bacteroides", "Baseline"))
# Factor the 'Biogeography' column with specific levels
Nano_normalized_long_Treg_df$Biogeography <- factor(Nano_normalized_long_Treg_df$Biogeography, 
                                                        levels = c("SI", "Cec", "Pro", "Dis"))

Nano_normalized_long_Treg_df$NormalizedCount <- as.numeric(Nano_normalized_long_Treg_df$NormalizedCount)



# Create the point plot


Nano_normalized_long_Treg_df_pointplot <- ggplot(Nano_normalized_long_Treg_df, aes( x=Biogeography, y=NormalizedCount, color = Treatment))+
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.25), size = 2) +  # Adjust position to separate points
  stat_summary(fun.y = mean, size=2, geom = "line", aes(group = Treatment)) +
  theme_bw()+
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Baseline" = "lightgreen", "PBS" = "lightblue", "Bacteroides" = "orange")) +
  geom_line(aes(group = interaction(Cage,Mouse)), size = 0.25)  # Add this line to connect points for each MouseID


Nano_normalized_long_Treg_df_pointplot


ggsave("Nano_normalized_long_Treg_df_pointplot.pdf", plot = Nano_normalized_long_Treg_df_pointplot
, device = "pdf", width = 8, height = 4)



#Run stats Foxp3
Nano_normalized_long_Treg_df_Foxp3_base <- Nano_normalized_long_Treg_df %>%
  filter(Gene == "Foxp3" & Treatment %in% c("Baseline"))

Nano_normalized_long_Treg_df_Foxp3_pvb <- Nano_normalized_long_Treg_df %>%
  filter(Gene == "Foxp3" & Treatment %in% c("PBS", "Bacteroides"))


  base_model_Treg_Foxp3 <- lmerTest::lmer(log2(NormalizedCount) ~ Biogeography + Sex + (1|Cage/Mouse), data = Nano_normalized_long_Treg_df_Foxp3_base)
summary(base_model_Treg_Foxp3)

  pvb_model_Treg_Foxp3 <- lmerTest::lmer(log2(NormalizedCount) ~ Treatment + Sex + Biogeography + Biogeography*Treatment + (1|Cage/Mouse), data = Nano_normalized_long_Treg_df_Foxp3_pvb)
summary(pvb_model_Treg_Foxp3)


```

#Make a plot of all genes associated with B cells 
```{r}


# List of genes to keep
B_cell_genes <- c("Blk", "Cd19", "Fcrlb", "Ms4a1", "Pnoc", "Spib", "Tcl1", "Tnfrsf17")

# Subset Nano_normalized_long_df for the specified genes
Nano_normalized_long_Bcell_df <- Nano_normalized_long_df %>%
  filter(Gene %in% B_cell_genes)


# Factor the 'Treatment' column with specific levels
Nano_normalized_long_Bcell_df$Treatment <- factor(Nano_normalized_long_Bcell_df$Treatment, 
                                                        levels = c("PBS", "Bacteroides", "Baseline"))
# Factor the 'Biogeography' column with specific levels
Nano_normalized_long_Bcell_df$Biogeography <- factor(Nano_normalized_long_Bcell_df$Biogeography, 
                                                        levels = c("SI", "Cec", "Pro", "Dis"))

Nano_normalized_long_Bcell_df$NormalizedCount <- as.numeric(Nano_normalized_long_Bcell_df$NormalizedCount)



# Create the point plot

Nano_normalized_long_Bcell_df_pointplot <- ggplot(Nano_normalized_long_Bcell_df, aes( x=Biogeography, y=NormalizedCount, color = Treatment))+
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.25), size = 2) +  # Adjust position to separate points
  stat_summary(fun.y = mean, size=2, geom = "line", aes(group = Treatment)) +
  theme_bw()+
  facet_wrap(~Gene, scales = "free_y", nrow = 4) + # Facet by gene with free y-axis and 4 rows
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Baseline" = "lightgreen", "PBS" = "lightblue", "Bacteroides" = "orange")) +
  geom_line(aes(group = interaction(Cage,Mouse)), size = 0.25)  # Add this line to connect points for each MouseID


Nano_normalized_long_Bcell_df_pointplot


ggsave("Nano_normalized_long_Bcell_df_pointplot.pdf", plot = Nano_normalized_long_Bcell_df_pointplot
, device = "pdf", width = 10, height = 6)

#Create a boxplot
Nano_normalized_long_Bcell_df_boxplot <- ggplot(Nano_normalized_long_Bcell_df, aes(x = Biogeography, y = NormalizedCount, color = Treatment)) +
  geom_boxplot() +  # Use geom_boxplot
  theme_bw() +
  facet_wrap(~ Gene, scales = "free_y", nrow = 4) +  # Facet by gene with free y-axis and 4 rows
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Baseline" = "lightgreen", "PBS" = "lightblue", "Bacteroides" = "orange"))

Nano_normalized_long_Bcell_df_boxplot

ggsave("Nano_normalized_long_Bcell_df_boxplot.pdf", plot = Nano_normalized_long_Bcell_df_boxplot
, device = "pdf", width = 10, height = 6)


#Run stats B cells
# Create the "Bcells" directory if it doesn't exist
dir.create("Bcells", showWarnings = FALSE)

# Get the unique genes
unique_genes <- unique(Nano_normalized_long_Bcell_df$Gene)

# Loop through each gene
for (gene in unique_genes) {
  # Subset data for the current gene
  Nano_normalized_long_Bcell_df_gene_base <- Nano_normalized_long_Bcell_df %>%
    filter(Gene == gene & Treatment %in% c("Baseline"))

  Nano_normalized_long_Bcell_df_gene_pvb <- Nano_normalized_long_Bcell_df %>%
    filter(Gene == gene & Treatment %in% c("PBS", "Bacteroides"))

  # Base model for current gene
  base_model_Bcell<- lmerTest::lmer(log2(NormalizedCount) ~ Biogeography + Sex + (1|Cage/Mouse), 
                                    data = Nano_normalized_long_Bcell_df_gene_base)
  base_summary <- summary(base_model_Bcell)

  # PVB model for current gene
  pvb_model_Bcell <- lmerTest::lmer(log2(NormalizedCount) ~ Treatment + Sex + Biogeography + Biogeography*Treatment + (1|Cage/Mouse), 
                                   data = Nano_normalized_long_Bcell_df_gene_pvb)
  pvb_summary <- summary(pvb_model_Bcell)

  # Write summaries to a text file
  file_name <- paste0("Bcells/model_", gene, ".csv")
  capture.output(base_summary, file = file_name)
  capture.output(pvb_summary, file = file_name, append = TRUE)
}





```

#Make a plot of all genes associated with Mast cells 
```{r}


# List of genes to keep
B_cell_genes <- c("Blk", "Cd19", "Fcrlb", "Ms4a1", "Pnoc", "Spib", "Tcl1", "Tnfrsf17")

# Subset Nano_normalized_long_df for the specified genes
Nano_normalized_long_Bcell_df <- Nano_normalized_long_df %>%
  filter(Gene %in% B_cell_genes)


# Factor the 'Treatment' column with specific levels
Nano_normalized_long_Bcell_df$Treatment <- factor(Nano_normalized_long_Bcell_df$Treatment, 
                                                        levels = c("PBS", "Bacteroides", "Baseline"))
# Factor the 'Biogeography' column with specific levels
Nano_normalized_long_Bcell_df$Biogeography <- factor(Nano_normalized_long_Bcell_df$Biogeography, 
                                                        levels = c("SI", "Cec", "Pro", "Dis"))

Nano_normalized_long_Bcell_df$NormalizedCount <- as.numeric(Nano_normalized_long_Bcell_df$NormalizedCount)



# Create the point plot


Nano_normalized_long_Bcell_df_pointplot <- ggplot(Nano_normalized_long_Bcell_df, aes( x=Biogeography, y=NormalizedCount, color = Treatment))+
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.25), size = 2) +  # Adjust position to separate points
  stat_summary(fun.y = mean, size=2, geom = "line", aes(group = Treatment)) +
  theme_bw()+
  facet_wrap(~Gene, scales = "free_y", nrow = 4) + # Facet by gene with free y-axis and 4 rows
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Baseline" = "lightgreen", "PBS" = "lightblue", "Bacteroides" = "orange")) +
  geom_line(aes(group = interaction(Cage,Mouse)), size = 0.25)  # Add this line to connect points for each MouseID


Nano_normalized_long_Bcell_df_pointplot


ggsave("Nano_normalized_long_Bcell_df_pointplot.pdf", plot = Nano_normalized_long_Bcell_df_pointplot
, device = "pdf", width = 10, height = 6)



#Run stats B cells
# Create the "Bcells" directory if it doesn't exist
dir.create("Bcells", showWarnings = FALSE)

# Get the unique genes
unique_genes <- unique(Nano_normalized_long_Bcell_df$Gene)

# Loop through each gene
for (gene in unique_genes) {
  # Subset data for the current gene
  Nano_normalized_long_Bcell_df_gene_base <- Nano_normalized_long_Bcell_df %>%
    filter(Gene == gene & Treatment %in% c("Baseline"))

  Nano_normalized_long_Bcell_df_gene_pvb <- Nano_normalized_long_Bcell_df %>%
    filter(Gene == gene & Treatment %in% c("PBS", "Bacteroides"))

  # Base model for current gene
  base_model_Bcell<- lmerTest::lmer(log2(NormalizedCount) ~ Biogeography + Sex + (1|Cage/Mouse), 
                                    data = Nano_normalized_long_Bcell_df_gene_base)
  base_summary <- summary(base_model_Bcell)

  # PVB model for current gene
  pvb_model_Bcell <- lmerTest::lmer(log2(NormalizedCount) ~ Treatment + Sex + Biogeography + Biogeography*Treatment + (1|Cage/Mouse), 
                                   data = Nano_normalized_long_Bcell_df_gene_pvb)
  pvb_summary <- summary(pvb_model_Bcell)

  # Write summaries to a text file
  file_name <- paste0("Bcells/model_", gene, ".csv")
  capture.output(base_summary, file = file_name)
  capture.output(pvb_summary, file = file_name, append = TRUE)
}





```


#Autophagy Genes
```{r}
# List of genes to keep
autophagy_genes <- c("Atg10", "Atg12", "Atg13", "Atg3", "Atg4a", "Atg7", "Becn1", "Map1lc3a", "Mtor", "Pik3c3", "Pik3r4", "Rb1cc1", "Ulk1", "Ulk2", "Wipi1")

# Subset Nano_normalized_long_df for the specified genes
Nano_normalized_long_autophagy_df <- Nano_normalized_long_df %>%
  filter(Gene %in% autophagy_genes,
         Treatment %in% c("PBS", "Bacteroides"))



# Factor the 'Treatment' column with specific levels
Nano_normalized_long_autophagy_df$Treatment <- factor(Nano_normalized_long_autophagy_df$Treatment, 
                                                        levels = c("PBS", "Bacteroides", "Baseline"))
# Factor the 'Biogeography' column with specific levels
Nano_normalized_long_autophagy_df$Biogeography <- factor(Nano_normalized_long_autophagy_df$Biogeography, 
                                                        levels = c("SI", "Cec", "Pro", "Dis"))

Nano_normalized_long_autophagy_df$NormalizedCount <- as.numeric(Nano_normalized_long_autophagy_df$NormalizedCount)

# Create the box plot

Nano_normalized_long_autophagy_df_boxplot <- ggplot(Nano_normalized_long_autophagy_df, aes(x = Biogeography, y = NormalizedCount, color = Treatment)) +
  geom_boxplot() +  # Use geom_boxplot
  theme_bw() +
  facet_wrap(~ Gene, scales = "free_y", nrow = 4) +  # Facet by gene with free y-axis and 4 rows
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Baseline" = "lightgreen", "PBS" = "lightblue", "Bacteroides" = "orange"))

Nano_normalized_long_autophagy_df_boxplot

ggsave("Nano_normalized_long_autophagy_df_boxplot.pdf", plot = Nano_normalized_long_autophagy_df_boxplot
, device = "pdf", width = 10, height = 6)

#Run stats autophagy genes

#atg10
Nano_normalized_long_autophagy_atg10_df <- Nano_normalized_long_autophagy_df %>%
  filter(Gene %in% "Atg10")

  pvb_model_autophagy_atg10 <- lmerTest::lmer(log2(NormalizedCount) ~ Treatment + Sex + Biogeography + Biogeography*Treatment + (1|Cage/Mouse), data = Nano_normalized_long_autophagy_atg10_df)
summary(pvb_model_autophagy_atg10)

#atg12
Nano_normalized_long_autophagy_atg12_df <- Nano_normalized_long_autophagy_df %>%
  filter(Gene %in% "Atg12")

  pvb_model_autophagy_atg12 <- lmerTest::lmer(log2(NormalizedCount) ~ Treatment + Sex + Biogeography + Biogeography*Treatment + (1|Cage/Mouse), data = Nano_normalized_long_autophagy_atg12_df)
summary(pvb_model_autophagy_atg12)

```

#Plot CD84 and CD183
```{r}

#Load a dataframe with just CD84 and Cd163 and Mms4a4a PBS vs Bacteroides
Nano_normalized_long_macrophages_df_Cd163_pvb
Nano_normalized_long_macrophages_df_Cd84_pvb
Nano_normalized_long_macrophages_df_Ms4a4a_pvb


#subset out the colon for cd163
# Assume your dataframe is named Nano_normalized_long_macrophages_df_Cd163_pvb
Cd163_pvb_colon <- Nano_normalized_long_macrophages_df_Cd163_pvb %>%
  filter(Biogeography != "SI")

Cd163_pvb_colon_female <- Cd163_pvb_colon %>%
  filter(Sex != "Male")

#Plot on x axis each region, y axis the normalized count, and color by Treatment
Cd163_pvb_boxplot <- ggplot(Cd163_pvb_colon_female, aes(x = Treatment, y = NormalizedCount, color = Treatment)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  theme_bw() +
  facet_wrap(~Biogeography, ncol=4)+
  labs(y = "Total Reads", x = "Sample", color = "Treatment") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("PBS" = "lightblue", "Bacteroides" = "orange")) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))  # Optionally rotate x-axis labels

Cd163_pvb_boxplot

# Save the plot as a PDF
ggsave("Cd163_pvb_boxplot.pdf", plot = Cd163_pvb_boxplot, width = 8, height = 4, device = "pdf")

######################################################################
#subset out the colon for cd84
# Assume your dataframe is named Nano_normalized_long_macrophages_df_Cd163_pvb
Cd84_pvb_colon <- Nano_normalized_long_macrophages_df_Cd84_pvb %>%
  filter(Biogeography != "SI")

Cd84_pvb_colon_female <- Cd84_pvb_colon %>%
  filter(Sex != "Male")

#Plot on x axis each region, y axis the normalized count, and color by Treatment
Cd84_pvb_boxplot <- ggplot(Cd84_pvb_colon, aes(x = Treatment, y = NormalizedCount, color = Treatment)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  theme_bw() +
  facet_wrap(~Biogeography, ncol=4)+
  labs(y = "Total Reads", x = "Sample", color = "Treatment") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("PBS" = "lightblue", "Bacteroides" = "orange")) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))  # Optionally rotate x-axis labels

Cd84_pvb_boxplot

# Save the plot as a PDF
ggsave("Cd84_pvb_boxplot.pdf", plot = Cd84_pvb_boxplot, width = 8, height = 4, device = "pdf")

######################################################################
#subset out the colon for cd84
# Assume your dataframe is named Nano_normalized_long_macrophages_df_Cd163_pvb
Ms4a4a_pvb_colon <- Nano_normalized_long_macrophages_df_Ms4a4a_pvb %>%
  filter(Biogeography != "SI")

Ms4a4a_pvb_colon_female <- Ms4a4a_pvb_colon %>%
  filter(Sex != "Male")

#Plot on x axis each region, y axis the normalized count, and color by Treatment
Ms4a4a_pvb_boxplot <- ggplot(Ms4a4a_pvb_colon, aes(x = Treatment, y = NormalizedCount, color = Treatment)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  theme_bw() +
  facet_wrap(~Biogeography, ncol=4)+
  labs(y = "Total Reads", x = "Sample", color = "Treatment") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("PBS" = "lightblue", "Bacteroides" = "orange")) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))  # Optionally rotate x-axis labels

Ms4a4a_pvb_boxplot

# Save the plot as a PDF
ggsave("Ms4a4a_pvb_boxplot.pdf", plot = Ms4a4a_pvb_boxplot, width = 8, height = 4, device = "pdf")

######################################################################

Nano_normalized_long_Atg12_df


# Subset Nano_normalized_long_df for the specified treatments and biogeography
Nano_normalized_long_Atg12_df <- Nano_normalized_long_Atg12_df %>%
  filter(Treatment %in% pvb_treatment,
         Biogeography !="SI")

#Plot on x axis each region, y axis the normalized count, and color by Treatment
Atg12_pvb_boxplot <- ggplot(Nano_normalized_long_Atg12_df, aes(x = Treatment, y = NormalizedCount, color = Treatment)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  theme_bw() +
  facet_wrap(~Biogeography, ncol=4)+
  labs(y = "Total Reads", x = "Sample", color = "Treatment") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("PBS" = "lightblue", "Bacteroides" = "orange")) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))  # Optionally rotate x-axis labels

Atg12_pvb_boxplot

# Save the plot as a PDF
ggsave("Ms4a4a_pvb_boxplot.pdf", plot = Ms4a4a_pvb_boxplot, width = 8, height = 4, device = "pdf")


```
